identity.role: Rule 30 center-column entropy with VOA partition syndromes

pattern: complete-unformalized work -> formalization in paper-bound space -> Forge

source_work.state_before: complete product core (Rule30Engine, VOAPartition, syndrome) with API/SDK layers; never formalized, no forge, repo fourpack copy was docs/metadata only

adjudicated_divergence: product_entropy seeded only the syndrome chain while always evolving the canonical single-cell CA state (seed never reached the entropy source). EntropyForge seeds the CA initial window from SHA-256 expansion so distinct seeds give distinct streams; canonical=no-seed mode preserves the single-cell column as the paper-bound object.
validated_claims: Rule 30 formula L^(C|R) matches Wolfram code 30 on all 8 chart states.
VOA weights over the 8 chart states are exactly Z(q) = 2q^0 + 6q^5 (2 vacua, 6 excited).
D4 antipodal labeling partitions the 8 states into 4 complement pairs.
Two independent Rule 30 implementations agree on 512 canonical center bits.
No period p <= 256 exists in the first 2048 canonical center bits (finite non-periodicity window).
XOR-debiased canonical stream density is within 5% of 1/2.
VOA syndrome is deterministic and window-sensitive.
Distinct seeds separate streams; identical seeds repeat them.
Entropy blocks round-trip through dict form and verify client-side.
honesty_boundary: Infinite-column non-periodicity is NOT claimed; it remains an open conjecture logged as an obligation. Only the finite window check is bound to the paper.
open_obligations: NIST SP 800-22 style statistical suite for the seeded stream (product layer, not paper claim).
Promote the product API/SDK layers (fastapi/uvicorn) as an adapter once the forge core is the dependency.
Extend the finite non-periodicity window as compute allows; record window growth in receipts.
Next fourpack candidate through the same pattern: product_sentinel.
notes: Second instance of the promotion pattern (first: PaneForge-Workspace-Tool). The pattern is: take complete-but-unformalized work, provide the formalization inside the repo paper-bound space, then make a Forge for it.
